resources.string: The json file used for maintenance announcement.
That\'s an error. Please try again.
Try to refresh this page again
Drag and select the area to create a question
Drag and capture the area to create question
No internet connection. Please check your internet and try again.
Upgrade now to unlock the full Leaderboard experience.
Upgrade the plan to access the following features.
Please check your internet connection and try again.
Allow ClassSwift to display on top of other apps you’re using. This app will be able to see where you tap on the screen.
Permission required to continue. Please enable the necessary permissions in System Settings and try again.
Something went wrong, please try again.
Go to the browser to complete login
Do you want to save your login information?
This app is currently unavailable in your region. Please contact your sales representative for assistance.
We’d love to know a little more about you. Fill this out and you’re all set to dive in!

We’ve recently updated our terms and conditions on the below policies. To continue using ClassSwift, please review and accept these changes. Your privacy and data security are important to us, and these updates aim to enhance your experience.
I agree to the ClassSwift %s and %s . We process your personal data in accordance with our %s.
I consent to participating in the ClassSwift AI Beta Program, agreeing to provide feedback aimed at improving product features and functionalities.

I want to receive the latest ClassSwift news and promotions. I agree to the evaluation of the newsletter usage with the aim of newsletter improvement. I am aware that I can withdraw my consent at any time. We use your data exclusively in accordance with our %s.
Are you sure you want to end the lesson and return to Class List?
Are you sure you want to end the lesson and log out?
Are you sure you want to end the lesson and quit ClassSwift?
Make your class more interactive and fun in 5 easy steps.
Choose or create a class and start instantly—it\'s that easy!
Share a QR code, link, or class ID—students can jump in right away!
No need to upload files—just use what you already have to start a question.
Add Some Sparkles to Your Class
Make learning fun! Use points and engagement tools to keep students engaged.
Enhance Your Teaching with Smart Tools
The toolbar is packed with features to support your lessons.
You can restart anytime in Settings.\nNo pressure—just want you to feel ready!
Failed to load the video. Please try again.
Scan with Your Camera to Learn More
Start teaching now, or revisit this tutorial anytime from Settings.
Failed to end the tutorial. If the issue persists, try restarting the app.
You\'re all set! Choose a class from the list to get started.
Tap “Enter Class” to view your imported student list.
Choose a class from the list to get started.
Tap “Enter Class” to view your imported student list.
This roster is automatically synced from your organization\'s roster source.
Students can join your class by shared the class link.
The student list can be updated anytime from ClassSwift Hub. Guest seats are available for students to choose when joining your class.
Students can scan the QR code using their device\'s native camera to join your class.
Click Start Lesson when you\'re ready
Unlock powerful classroom tools, and students can still join anytime.
Are you sure you want to quit ClassSwift?\nUnsaved class records will be lost.
Previous versions will no longer be supported. Please download the latest version.
Leaving will end the current class session.
Invite students to join\nwith a class code or QR code.
Removed students can’t join the next quiz.
Unexpected event happened, please try again.
Hang tight! Your connection is a bit unstable. Check your Wi-Fi to see your class.
Please check your internet connection and try again.
%s \nLesson data will be permanently deleted once you remove the student.
Failed to remove %s. Please check your connection and try again.
Failed to add point to %s. Please try again.
Failed to subtract point to %s. Please try again.
Failed to find student list. Please try again.
Failed to select organization. Please try again.
You are logged in on another device.
You have been logged out by organization admin.
You have been logged out by organization admin. Please wait a few minutes before you try again.
All available seats have been taken. Please contact your organization admin for access.
Select or create a class to join
This action will permanently delete this class.
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
%s plan allows a maximum of %s concurrent users
If you want to customize classes, add new class in ClassSwift Hub.
Failed to delete %s. Please try again.
Failed to save class. Please try again.
Failed to create new class. Please try again.
Failed to join class. Please try again.
Failed to rejoin the ongoing class. Please try again.
Class already exists. Please try again.
Failed to find class list. Please try again.
Failed to start lesson. Please try again.
This class is currently in session. Multiple teachers are not allowed to start the class at the same time.
Click an option to highlight students
Click an option to highlight students
Failed to load results. Please try again.
Failed to send and save. Please try again.
Failed to end the task. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to close the question? Unfinished responses will be lost.
Failed to start question. Please try again.
Failed to start question. Please end the unfinished question first.
Are you sure you want to close the question?
Failed to close the question. Please try again
Failed to end the question. Please try again
Failed to screenshot the question. Please try again.
Try switching folders to view other questions
Try to refresh this page again
Failed to start question(s). Please try again.
Another question is currently ongoing. Please end the question before starting a new one.
No quiz has been created yet
Select a quiz type and content to create a quiz
Failed to load your quiz collection
The folder name cannot be the same as the Home folder.\nPlease enter a different name.
The folder name cannot be empty. Please enter a name.
Failed to create a new folder. Please try again.
\"​%1$s\" will be deleted forever and you will not be able to restore it. If there are questions in the folder, they will be deleted as well.
Failed to delete folder. Please try again.
Failed to rename folder. Please try again.
Your action has not been completed yet. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d questions? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete 1 question? This action cannot be undone.
Failed to delete question(s). Please try again.
Failed to delete question(s). Please try again.
Failed to move questions. Please try again.
Failed to move question. Please try again.
Select a question type and content to create a question
No question has been created yet
Failed to pin question. Please try again.
The question has been pinned to the front!
Another question is currently ongoing. Please end the quiz before starting a new one.
Failed to unpin question. Please try again.
This app is only supported on certain ViewSonic IFP models. Please switch to a compatible device to continue.
Unable to check for updates. This might be due to a temporary server issue. Please try again later.
Unable to download. Please check your internet connection.
Failed to download ClassSwift. Please check your internet connection.
Failed to install ClassSwift. Please try again.
Unable to complete app check. This might be due to a temporary server issue. Please try again later. (Code: NTF-01)
Failed to access translation tool settings. Please try again.
Failed to toggle the translation tool. Please try again.
Language changes require a quick system reset and restart.
Updating your language settings…\nPlease wait a moment.
Switching the language now will discard any unfinished actions in this session. Do you want to continue?
You have logged in on another device. You are being logged out from this device.
Scan to sign into ViewSonic Account
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to delete %d material(s)?
You still have an ongoing question. Are you sure you want to end the question and push tasks?
Failed to push tasks. Please end the unfinished question first.
Push task: %d task(s) failed to push.
Push task: %d task(s) pushed successfully, %d task(s) failed to push.
You still have ongoing tasks. Are you sure you want to end the tasks and start the question?
Failed to start question. Please end the unfinished tasks first.
No one\'s in the room. Start by inviting people to join.
Only one re-upload is allowed at a time. Please try again later.
Failed to upload image. Please try again
A maximum of 4 pictures can be combined (excluding links).
Start by pushing content to class
New record submitted from this participants. Please mark again.
Failed to send and save. Please try again.
Your action has not been completed yet.\n Are you sure you want to leave this page?
Mark task: %1$s task failed to mark.
Mark task: %1$s task marked successfully, %2$s task failed to mark.
Failed to label as graded. Please try again.
Not submitted. Please select another record to mark.
End task: %d task failed to end.
End task: %1$d task ended successfully, %2$d task failed to end.
Are you sure you want to end task?
Are you sure you want to end all tasks?
The student has not submitted yet
Lesson data will be permanently deleted once you remove the student.
Are you sure you want to end this lesson?
Are you sure you want to end task?
Are you sure you want to end all tasks?
Your action has not been completed yet. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
Screen capture requires screen recording permission. Please enable it in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Screen Recording.
There are no batch quizzes in this folder. Please select a different folder.
Only a maximum of 20 quizzes can be started at a time.
Failed to start the quiz builder. Please try again.
Quiz Builder is limited to True/False and Multiple Choice questions with correct answers, and at least two questions are required to start the quiz.
Are you sure you want to end and close the question?
You have an ongoing push task or quiz. Are you sure you want to end it and start the %s?
Select or create a class to join
Something went wrong, please check your internet status and try again later.
Failed to show class. Please try again.
Failed to end question. Please try again.
Failed to show students’ responds. Please try again.
Failed to refresh submission status. Please try again.
